events.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: England vs Ghana
events.note: England faces Ghana in a Group L match at Gillette Stadium in Boston. ([nbcsports.com](https://www.nbcsports.com/soccer/news/2026-world-cup-schedule-confirmed-dates-times-stadiums-full-details?utm_source=openai))
events.marketing_angle: Highlighting the excitement of international football with a focus on the England vs Ghana match.
events.why_selected: Major international football event with global viewership.

events.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Round of 32 Begins
events.note: The knockout stage of the World Cup kicks off with the Round of 32 matches. ([nbcsports.com](https://www.nbcsports.com/soccer/news/2026-world-cup-schedule-confirmed-dates-times-stadiums-full-details?utm_source=openai))
events.marketing_angle: Building excitement for the World Cup's knockout stages.
events.why_selected: The start of the knockout rounds in the World Cup is a major sporting event.

events.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Round of 32 Matches

events.title: Formula 1: Austrian Grand Prix
events.note: The Formula 1 season continues with the Austrian Grand Prix at the Red Bull Ring in Spielberg. ([topendsports.com](https://www.topendsports.com/events/calendar-2026.php?utm_source=openai))
events.marketing_angle: Engaging motorsport enthusiasts with coverage of the Austrian Grand Prix.

events.title: MotoGP: Dutch TT at Assen
events.note: The MotoGP series heads to Assen, Netherlands, for the Dutch TT race. ([topendsports.com](https://www.topendsports.com/events/calendar-2026.php?utm_source=openai))
events.marketing_angle: Capturing the thrill of motorcycle racing at the Dutch TT.
events.why_selected: MotoGP is a major motorsport event with a dedicated fan base.
